requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (SLSI scheme + SLS/IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（SLSI制度 + SLS/IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（SLSI制度 + SLS/IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances supplied to the Sri Lanka market must meet electrical safety requirements based on IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read with the general standard IEC 60335-1, as adopted by the Sri Lanka Standards Institution （SLSI） in the SLS series. SLSI is the national standards body and the conformity-assessment / product-certification authority; refrigerators fall under its mandatory certification and import-inspection control for regulated electrical products. Key requirements cover protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, earthing continuity, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, mechanical strength, and appliance marking. Appliances must be rated for the Sri Lanka supply of 230 V, 50 Hz. Conformity is demonstrated through SLSI product certification leading to the SLS mark （or import-consignment inspection）; an IECEE CB Scheme test report against IEC 60335-2-24 is commonly used as supporting evidence.
summary.zh: 供应斯里兰卡市场的家用制冷器具须符合基于IEC 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求）的电气安全要求，并须与通用标准IEC 60335-1结合使用，该等标准由斯里兰卡标准协会（SLSI）以SLS系列采用。SLSI为国家标准机构及合格评定/产品认证主管机构；电冰箱属于其对受管制电气产品的强制认证及进口检验控制范围。核心要求涵盖：防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、接地连续性、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、机械强度及器具标识。器具须按斯里兰卡230 V、50 Hz供电定额设计。合格性通过SLSI产品认证（取得SLS标志）或进口批次检验予以证明；依据IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB体系检测报告通常作为支撑证据。
summary.zht: 供應斯里蘭卡市場的家用製冷器具須符合基於IEC 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求）的電氣安全要求，並須與通用標準IEC 60335-1結合使用，該等標準由斯里蘭卡標準協會（SLSI）以SLS系列採用。SLSI為國家標準機構及合格評定/產品認證主管機構；電冰箱屬於其對受管制電氣產品的強制認證及進口檢驗控制範圍。核心要求涵蓋：防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、接地連續性、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、機械強度及器具標識。器具須按斯里蘭卡230 V、50 Hz供電定額設計。合格性通過SLSI產品認證（取得SLS標誌）或進口批次檢驗予以證明；依據IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB體系檢測報告通常作為支撐證據。

standards_or_laws: SLS/IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (adopted by SLSI from IEC 60335-2-24)
SLS/IEC 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
Sri Lanka Standards Institution Act and SLSI product certification / import inspection scheme for regulated electrical products

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations, read with GB 4706.1-2005 (general requirements). It is mandatory and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification （CCC） regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated body before sale in China and are rated for the China supply of 220 V, 50 Hz （single phase）. Because both GB 4706.13 and the Sri Lanka SLS adoption trace to IEC 60335-2-24, the underlying technical content is broadly aligned, but the CCC certificate itself is a China-domestic approval and is not automatically recognised by SLSI.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010并含中国国家偏差，须与GB 4706.1-2005（通用要求）结合使用。该标准为强制性，由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度监督执行；产品须经CNCA指定机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售，并按中国220 V、50 Hz（单相）供电定额设计。由于GB 4706.13与斯里兰卡SLS采用版本均源自IEC 60335-2-24，底层技术内容大体一致，但CCC证书本身为中国国内批准，不被SLSI自动认可。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010並含中國國家偏差，須與GB 4706.1-2005（通用要求）結合使用。該標準為強制性，由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度監督執行；產品須經CNCA指定機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售，並按中國220 V、50 Hz（單相）供電定額設計。由於GB 4706.13與斯里蘭卡SLS採用版本均源自IEC 60335-2-24，底層技術內容大體一致，但CCC證書本身為中國國內批准，不被SLSI自動認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Because both the Chinese GB 4706.13 standard and the Sri Lanka SLS adoption derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the technical safety basis is closely aligned, which lowers the engineering gap. The remaining gaps are procedural and certification-related: (1) the Chinese CCC certificate is not accepted by SLSI — separate SLSI product certification or import-consignment inspection is required, with the SLS mark affixed; (2) supporting test evidence should be an IECEE CB Scheme report against IEC 60335-2-24 （plus IEC 60335-1）, ideally with a CB certificate, which SLSI can accept toward conformity; (3) the appliance must be rated and marked for 230 V, 50 Hz （Sri Lanka） rather than 220 V （China）, so nameplate ratings, plug type, and instructions must be verified; (4) markings and user instructions should be in the languages and format expected for the Sri Lanka market. Manufacturers should confirm the exact SLS reference number and current SLSI scheme route with the importer.
gap.zh: 由于中国GB 4706.13标准与斯里兰卡SLS采用版本均源自IEC 60335-2-24，电气安全的技术基础高度一致，降低了工程差距。剩余差距主要为程序与认证层面：（1）中国CCC证书不被SLSI接受——须另行取得SLSI产品认证或进行进口批次检验，并加贴SLS标志；（2）支撑检测证据宜为依据IEC 60335-2-24（及IEC 60335-1）的IECEE CB体系报告，最好附CB证书，SLSI可据此用于合格评定；（3）器具须按230 V、50 Hz（斯里兰卡）而非220 V（中国）定额并标识，故须核实铭牌定额、插头类型及说明书；（4）标识及用户说明书宜采用斯里兰卡市场所期望的语言和格式。制造商应向进口商确认具体SLS标准编号及现行SLSI制度路径。
gap.zht: 由於中國GB 4706.13標準與斯里蘭卡SLS採用版本均源自IEC 60335-2-24，電氣安全的技術基礎高度一致，降低了工程差距。剩餘差距主要為程序與認證層面：（1）中國CCC證書不被SLSI接受——須另行取得SLSI產品認證或進行進口批次檢驗，並加貼SLS標誌；（2）支撐檢測證據宜為依據IEC 60335-2-24（及IEC 60335-1）的IECEE CB體系報告，最好附CB證書，SLSI可據此用於合格評定；（3）器具須按230 V、50 Hz（斯里蘭卡）而非220 V（中國）定額並標識，故須核實銘牌定額、插頭類型及說明書；（4）標識及用戶說明書宜採用斯里蘭卡市場所期望的語言和格式。製造商應向進口商確認具體SLS標準編號及現行SLSI制度路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SLSI product certification / import inspection to SLS/IEC 60335-2-24 required before market supply in Sri Lanka; SLS mark applied on certified products
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety certification under the SLSI scheme to SLS/IEC 60335-2-24 is required for household refrigerators entering Sri Lanka. Chinese CCC certification to GB 4706.13 is not automatically accepted, but because both trace to IEC 60335-2-24 the technical gap is small; an IECEE CB report （IEC 60335-2-24 basis） generally supports SLSI conformity. Verify 230 V/50 Hz ratings, plug type, SLS mark, and the current SLSI scheme route with a qualified consultant and the Sri Lanka importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入斯里兰卡的家用电冰箱须在SLSI制度下依据SLS/IEC 60335-2-24完成电气安全认证。中国依据GB 4706.13的CCC认证不被自动接受，但由于双方均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技术差距较小；IECEE CB报告（基于IEC 60335-2-24）通常可支撑SLSI合格评定。请与合格顾问及斯里兰卡进口商核实230 V/50 Hz定额、插头类型、SLS标志及现行SLSI制度路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入斯里蘭卡的家用電冰箱須在SLSI制度下依據SLS/IEC 60335-2-24完成電氣安全認證。中國依據GB 4706.13的CCC認證不被自動接受，但由於雙方均源自IEC 60335-2-24，技術差距較小；IECEE CB報告（基於IEC 60335-2-24）通常可支撐SLSI合格評定。請與合格顧問及斯里蘭卡進口商核實230 V/50 Hz定額、插頭類型、SLS標誌及現行SLSI制度路徑。
